lines: This is personal research shared to help — useful, but not a guaranteed guide and not affiliated with Adobe or listed employers. Data can be incomplete or wrong; I’ve tried my best. Always confirm openings on the employer careers page.

This is not a company ranking: every organisation has pros and cons. Frequent means they often post AEM/DXP roles (not an open job). Preferred is my opinion only. Careers and evidence links are snapshots and may move. The best path is to keep upgrading yourself and follow the methods that work for you.

purpose.intro: Useful when you are applying now — and when you are simply staying sharp:
points: Learn from interview gaps instead of only memorising answers.
Keep LinkedIn and Naukri current so the right role can find you.
A relaxed interview every few months helps you sense pay and market fit.
Companies, apply steps, roadmaps, and prep work best together.

hero.title: AEM employers, apply guide, and learning paths
